creator: kristinacors
caption: This is for anyone who did everything right and still feels off #travelcontentcreator #careerchange #corporateburnout #personalgrowthseries #challengethestatusquo

transcription.text: Questions I had to answer before choosing a different life. Hey guys, I'm Christina, and I went from working in HR on Wall Street to becoming a full-time travel content creator. Welcome to my series, Choosing for Life, where we talk about how it's never too late to reinvent yourself or redesign your lifestyle. For me, the first real shift came from answering one question, how do I define success? Because doing everything right on paper, the degrees, the good job, still left me stuck and unfulfilled. Basically, up until that point, I realized I had been chasing a version of success that I was programmed to want from society, from culture, from expectations, not one I consciously chose. I looked around at senior leaders that I worked with, and yeah, they had the titles, they had the money, but they had very little control over their time. Family time was always the thing getting sacrificed. Life just felt rushed. And for me, there was always this feeling of constant anxiety underneath it all. And I remember thinking, I don't actually want the life I'm working toward. And for me, that was a super scary realization, because what do you mean? I just worked my butt off for this interview. I just killed for this job. But I started redefining success. And for me, success became autonomy over my schedule, financial freedom, time with family, meaningful relationships, and doing work that actually serves people, not just the bottom line. And once I broke success down into my values, it was like a North Star for me. It gave me permission to walk a different, more aligned path and forget about what everybody else was doing, which eventually led me to leaving the corporate world and becoming a content creator. And let me be clear, this series is not about quitting your job. It's about questioning the ladder you're climbing before you reach the top and realize it's leaning against the wrong wall. So if you feel like that's the situation you're in, remember you're only one decision away from a completely different life. Follow the series if you want to help choosing a different life.
